title: Slack grant
description: Narrow a configured Slack connection for a job or session.

fields.name: mode
fields.label: Mode
fields.description: Authority for this specific job or session grant. Pick read, trigger, or send per granted tool; the underlying Slack connection can support multiple grants.

fields.name: max_thread_messages
fields.label: Max thread messages
fields.description: Maximum number of messages this grant may read from one Slack thread.

fields.name: max_message_chars
fields.label: Max message chars
fields.description: Maximum characters retained from each Slack message for this grant.

fields.name: max_body_chars
fields.label: Max send chars
fields.description: Maximum characters this grant may send after approval.

fields.name: max_dm_channels
fields.label: Max DM conversations
fields.description: Maximum number of DM conversations this grant may inspect when using recent DM tools.

fields.name: messages_per_dm
fields.label: Messages per DM
fields.description: Maximum messages read from each DM conversation.
